en: out of himself in front of the whole damn country the Congressional Medal of Honor.
ko: 온 나라 앞에서 자신을 잃고 의회 명예 훈장을 받았어.

en: Yeah, well, I just got one thing to say to that god damn bless America.
ko: 그래, 그럼 난 그저 미국 만세라고 말하고 싶어.

en: Lieutenant Dyant said he was living in a hotel,
ko: 다이안 중위는 호텔에 살고 있다고 했어,

en: and because he didn't have no legs,
he spent most of his time exercising his arms.
What do you do here in New York, Lieutenant Dyant?
I'm living off the government tip.
Hey, hey, hey! Are you blind? I'm walking!
ko: 이봐, 이봐, 이봐! 너 눈이 멀었어? 나 걷고 있어!
